title: marrubium multibracteatum subsp. ayachicum
intro: Marrubium multibracteatum subsp. ayachicum, also known as Ayachic Marrubium, is a subspecies of the Marrubium multibracteatum plant, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family of plants. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Marrubium multibracteatum subsp. ayachicum include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
